_comment: Per-brand classification for the Egregious Rotation banner renderer. If hasTextInLogo=true, the brand's logo already contains the brand name as a wordmark, so the separate text label is omitted to avoid redundancy and the logo is rendered larger. If false, the logo is a mark only (no readable brand name) and the text label is kept. Hand-curated 2026-06-08; consumed by scripts/build-egregious-banners.mjs. Revision 2026-06-08 PM: flipped home-depot/amazon/chipotle/acura-usa/ben-and-jerry-s to true after Aron review — their cached logo PNGs contain the wordmark even though the canonical mark is small (THE HOME DEPOT inside the orange tile, BEN & JERRY'S inside the badge, etc.), so the separate text label was redundant.
